summary: Created the unbudgeted V2 delivery Goal from the authoritative handoff.
Recorded current Web/GitHub research, framework comparison, and accepted ADR 002.
Implemented durable workspaces, safe file/ZIP import, source inventory, optional Docling parsing, persistent BM25, optional embeddings, and fusion.
Implemented bounded Haystack tools, deterministic/company model paths, exact-host embeddings, and typed governed analytics.
Added the fully synthetic commercial HVAC corpus, 17-case frozen evaluation, and measured deterministic baseline.
Added Windows/offline deployment, operations, admin/user, acceptance, and optional LightRAG A/B documentation.
A failing test showed SOP paths containing the word control were misclassified as configuration.
SOP directory classification now takes precedence; focused test and 17-case baseline passed.
Fresh full pytest passed locally with browser-only skips when no browser URL was configured.
Added a release-gating HVAC-engineer UX walkthrough and independent UX review.
Persist current requirements, decisions, evidence, failures, and next actions in a durable task-ledger/checkpoint structure.
Created the source-controlled V2 task ledger and append-only event log without modifying OnionQuant runtime state.
Added a zero-context company-PC Agent execution contract with inputs, stop conditions, checkpoints, local evaluation, UX acceptance, recovery, rollback and compact handback fields.
Verified deterministic, company, and explicitly approved embedding parameter paths in a policy-isolated PowerShell process; documented enterprise signing policy instead of weakening execution policy.
Current PyPI verification found build 1.5.1 does not exist and 1.5.0 is current; corrected CI and the deployment runbook before package verification.

Independent current Web/GitHub review retained the main architecture but identified release-blocking reranker, Docling metadata, Agent deadline, embedding CA and important lifecycle-lock/ranking-evaluation gaps.

Added natural-language diagnosis of complex commercial-HVAC defrost logic over user-selected 10-second telemetry windows, grounded in control documents and bounded read-only tools; research and feasibility evidence are in progress.
Closed official reranker/Docling metadata, true Agent deadline, shared internal-CA, lifecycle locking, multi-turn regression and ranking-evaluation gaps with tests.

Accepted deterministic temporal replay plus bounded Haystack explanation; added strict controller/firmware-scoped rules, 8640-row ten-second synthetic telemetry, Agent/Web integration and boundary/property tests.
Fresh deterministic run completed 19/19 cases with zero execution failures; 13 evidence cases measured Recall 1.0, MRR 0.8269230769 and NDCG 0.8773810496.
PDF parsing now requires approved local Docling artifacts and tokenizer; GitHub CI prefetches exact assets then runs real PDF/DOCX parsing with network model lookup disabled.
Regenerated runtime/dev dependency locks, expanded defrost/deployment/user documentation, and advanced the fresh verification slice.
Independent safety and HVAC UX reviewers reproduced project-switch evidence leakage, weak scope binding, sampling-boundary and engineer-readability release blockers.

Closed non-synthetic scope self-approval, fractional sampling/duration truncation, observed-value audit and interval-censored transition boundaries; final independent safety review reported Critical 0 and Important 0 for synthetic_demo only.

Closed project-switch evidence leakage and rollback, added engineer-readable defrost cards, complete citation locations, dialog-local delete errors and a full 320px mobile journey; independent UX review reported Critical 0 and Important 0.
Fresh frozen evaluation completed 23/23 cases with zero execution failures; 16 evidence cases measured Recall 1.0, MRR 0.859375 and NDCG 0.9003721028.
Fresh verify.cmd passed Ruff, formatting, 120 tests with 4 documented skips, and release guard; final Playwright desktop/320px journey passed against the restarted loopback server.
pip check and strict pip-audit passed, 50 license entries were compatible, wheel/sdist and reproducible CycloneDX SBOM were built, and the installed wheel passed isolated-target health smoke.
